summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1: HomePage.tsx has the Active Tournaments section and polling removed. REQ-2: AdminPanelPage.tsx calls notifyTournamentsUpdated() after create/delete, and TournamentsPage.tsx has storage event listener + 3-second polling. REQ-3: RegisterPage.tsx calls incrementTournamentSlots() and notifyTournamentsUpdated() after registration, and TournamentsPage.tsx reflects updates via polling/events. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
